summary: RM Procurement Module - Full e2e testing completed. All 18 backend API tests PASSED. All frontend navigation and flow tests PASSED. Complete procurement flow tested: Create Supplier -> Create PO -> Approve PO -> Receive GRN -> Return GRN. All 4 pages (RM Suppliers, RM Purchase Orders, RM GRN, RM GRN Returns) accessible from sidebar under Manufacturing section.

issues: Console warning about chart dimensions (-1x-1) - pre-existing issue from previous iterations

rm_suppliers_crud.details: Create, view, edit, delete RM suppliers working. Search functionality working. Supplier details show stats (total orders, outstanding balance)

rm_purchase_orders.details: Create PO with items, priority, payment terms, dates working. Approve PO flow working. Status filter working (draft/approved/partially_received/completed)

rm_grn.details: Receive goods against approved PO working. Partial receiving supported. Immediate payment option available. Summary cards showing totals

rm_grn_returns.details: Return defective items working. Both refund and credit settlement options available. Summary shows refunds vs credits breakdown

navigation.details: All 4 pages accessible under Manufacturing section: RM Suppliers, RM Purchase Orders, RM GRN, RM GRN Returns

financial_integration.details: Tested via API - immediate payment creates journal entry and reduces bank balance, credit terms create AP entry

api_tests.GET /api/rm-procurement/suppliers: PASS - Returns list of RM suppliers
api_tests.GET /api/rm-procurement/purchase-orders: PASS - Returns POs with status filter
api_tests.GET /api/rm-procurement/purchase-orders/: PASS - Returns PO with items and GRN history
api_tests.POST /api/rm-procurement/grn: PASS - Receives goods against approved PO
api_tests.GET /api/rm-procurement/grn-returns: PASS - Returns list of GRN returns

seed_data_creation: Test created: Playwright Test Supplier with timestamp suffix, Test PO approved for testing flow
context_for_next_testing_agent: RM Procurement Module fully tested. All 4 pages working: RM Suppliers, RM Purchase Orders, RM GRN, RM GRN Returns. Complete flow tested from supplier creation to PO creation, approval, goods receipt, and returns. Financial integration (immediate payment deducts from bank, credit terms create AP) verified via API tests. Test data created includes multiple test suppliers with TEST_RM prefix and Playwright Test Supplier prefix.
